calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-10-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Annelissa Nunez appeared via zoom (pro per) (petitioner).
Elizabeth Boyes appeared via zoom for Samuel Marquez (objector).

Discussion was held regarding the decedent's assets, that they are in a trust, that Ms. Nunez states her grandmother lacked mental capacity to when she signed the will, that the property is in litigation in Alameda County. Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is denied.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Ng. Not reported.
